*HIGHLIGHTED SECTION 3: THE SORTING ALGORITHM USED*
THE FUNCTION USES A BUBBLE SORT ALGORITHM TO SORT THE COMMON ELEMENTS IN ASCENDING ORDER. THIS ALGORITHM COMPARES EACH PAIR OF ADJACENT ELEMENTS AND SWAPS THEM IF THEY ARE IN THE WRONG ORDER.
